creator: martti.kuparinen@ericsson.com
text:
I have updated ports/security/stunnel to the latest version (3.4a).
Note that this version _requires_ openssl-0.9.4 or later (it will
not compile with openssl-0.9.2b as the OpenSSL folks have changed
one function prototype...)

I think ports/13216 and ports/13052 can be closed now.

How-To-Repeat: 
I have attached the new port files.
